sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115512" key="yeudolh|sth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψευδο-λῃστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n115512.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sham robber,</tr_> name of a Comedy by Timocles.</sense> </entryFree>
